title: Trade Poisonous Potatoes for Emeralds
description: A mod that adds a chance to trade farmer villagers poisonous potatoes for emeralds and will instantly level up your novice villager
body:
A mod that adds a chance to trade farmer villagers poisonous potatoes for emeralds and will instantly level up your novice villager.

**Novice 20 → 1**
10 Villager XP

**Journeyman 12 → 1**
15 Villager XP

**Made with MCreator**
